posts.text:
We can follow the path of realism and stability—championed by leaders like @POTUS Trump, @SecRubio, @MichaelJKnowles, and myself—or we can follow the path of slogan spewing fools who think America exists in a bubble detached from the realities of the world. Too many people are turning against the President because they are scared of the idea of using strength to enable a long term peace.

I know which one I’m sticking with.

Video

Tomorrow is Election Day.

“Every vote counts” may sound cliché, but this time it’s true.

Polls are open 7 AM–7 PM, and you can you can confirm your polling location at VoteTexas.gov

There’s a debate over the legality of the actions against Iran but the law is clear. While it appears intense, this is in fact a limited action, not an occupation, and not an open-ended war. The law is clear, and the President is operating within it.

Good operational strategy is also clear: don’t show hesitation mid-swing. What we absolutely cannot have right now are political roadblocks that weaken our position mid-operation. When American troops are in harm’s way, the last thing we should do

Greeks fighting the Persians just made everyone’s day.


OSINTtechnical (@Osinttechnical)

Greece to deploy multiple warships, fighters to Cyprus after Iranian attacks. 

Two Hellenic Navy frigates will be sent: one, the brand-new French-built FDI HN frigate HS Kimon (F-601).





— https://nitter.net/Osinttechnical/status/2028434675727782327#m

This strike was right near my old office on my 4th deployment. 

Keep our men and women in uniform in your thoughts and prayers.

Video

It’s the knock in the door that no family wants. 

Sadly, we’ve lost four American service members during Operation Epic Fury (one was lost since this interview was recorded). Four more have been seriously wounded. Several others are recovering from shrapnel injuries and concussions.

We pray for the fallen. We pray for the wounded. And we pray for the families who are now living every military family’s worst fear.

Their sacrifices were not for nothing. This cause is just and in the defense of

Praying for the victims and their families after the horrific shooting in Austin. Great work by the Austin Police for stopping the threat quickly.

Yes, this was possibly a terrorist attack. We don’t know just yet, but it is increasingly more likely than not. 

Years of open borders and allowing immigrants from countries where we were not always able to fully vet them created the potential for Iranian and Islamists sleeper cells. 

Stay on high alert, and remember: You have the right to defend y

While Western leftists clutch their pearls, the Iranian people are grabbing their freedom.

Video

Iran’s Supreme Leader is dead and, trust me, the world is better for it.

For decades, Khamenei ruled through intimidation and force - jailing and torturing dissidents, massacring protesters, and brutalizing women for demanding basic freedoms and also for simply existing. 

He wasn’t just a tyrant at home. Khamenei was a threat to America - fueling terror networks, destabilizing the region, and putting American lives in danger. He weaponized religion to secure power and silence anyone who challe

President Trump again doing what needs to be done. In this statement he said we plan to annihilate their missile sites and obliterate their Navy. This is the time to weaken them to a point where the Iranian people can finally beat the regime on their own. Saudi Arabia is even joining the fight along with Israel. And yes this is America First. The world’s number one sponsor of terror is finally being held accountable after 47 years. “Peace Through Strength” is only a good slogan if you remember t

This is the reality in Jalisco, missing person flyers line entire walls. That’s what life is like in the stronghold of CJNG. 

The cartels are a death cult that exports pain and suffering on normal families—in America and Mexico. 

This is who we’re fighting.

If you haven’t watched Secretary Rubio’s speech earlier this month in Munich, check it out. Here is a short clip. It was a monumental statement about America First foreign policy, and what peace though strength really means.

Strength prevents war. 

Weakness invites it.

Video
Testimonials from constituents
Attention Texas GOP Primary Voters
Dan Crenshaw for Congress
Texas Isn't Done Fighting. And Neither Am I.
Dan Crenshaw for Congress

Back the blue? Let's show them.

The demon cat of Capitol Hill
